THEMES.TITLE: Themes
THEMES.SUBTITLE: Themes and appearance management
THEMES.PREVIEW_FALLBACK: Token preview is not available right now. Showing the active theme.
THEMES.PREVIEW_CUSTOMCSS_BLOCKED: Custom CSS from metadata was blocked (does not pass the whitelist).
THEMES.SLUG_HELP: Optional. If left empty, the backend generates it automatically.
THEMES.PREVIEW_NO_VERSION: To preview, the theme must have a draft or a published version.
THEMES.DEFINE_MAIN_COLORS: Define main colors in JSON format
THEMES.CONFIRM_DELETE_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete the theme

DRAFT.TITLE: Draft
DRAFT.TABLE_HELP: Tip: tokens must start with “--” (for example: --cui-primary).
DRAFT.FROM_ZIP: This draft comes from a ZIP package.
DRAFT.NO_DRAFT: This theme doesn't have a draft yet. You can create one by pasting JSON tokens.
DRAFT.CONVERT_CONFIRM_MSG: This draft comes from a ZIP. If you convert to tokens, the ZIP reference will be lost. Continue?

THEMES.UNPUBLISH_CONFIRM_MSG: The published version will be removed (and if it is active, it will be deactivated). Continue?

PRESETS.TITLE: Presets
PRESETS.DESC: Global presets to quickly apply to the draft.
PRESETS.APPLY_HELP: Replace overwrites the draft with the preset. Merge keeps existing tokens and overwrites only preset keys.
PRESETS.APPLY_CONFIRM_MSG: The current draft will be replaced by the selected preset. Continue?

VERSIONS.TITLE: History (published)
VERSIONS.ROLLBACK_NOT_AVAILABLE: There is no previous version available to rollback
VERSIONS.DELETE_CONFIRM_MSG: The selected published version will be deleted. If it was active, the theme will be restored to default. Continue?

STUDIO.TITLE: Theme Studio
STUDIO.ADVANCED_REQUIRED: Enable advanced mode to see this section
STUDIO.SAVING_WAIT: Saving draft… please wait before opening the preview

OVERVIEW.TITLE: Theme Studio
OVERVIEW.DESC: Workspace to manage the theme without a crowded modal.
OVERVIEW.HINT: Tip: use Simple for quick changes and Advanced for tokens/versions.
OVERVIEW.MODE_DESC: You can switch between Simple and Advanced at any time.

SIMPLE.TITLE: Simple editing (recommended)
SIMPLE.DESC: Adjust the main tokens without editing JSON.
SIMPLE.RESET_OK: View reset and unsaved changes discarded
SIMPLE.RESET_DRAFT_CONFIRM: The 6 recommended tokens (primary/bg/text/border…) will be removed from the draft. Continue?
SIMPLE.QUICK_PREVIEW_HELP: If you don't notice changes, check this preview: it shows Primary, Border and Text clearly even if the rest of the Admin isn't using them.

PREVIEW.TITLE: Preview
PREVIEW.DESC: Preview the theme. If token preview is intermittent, use local preview.

ACTIVE.LABEL: Active theme
ACTIVE.INFO: Publishing does not change the active theme. To apply it on the public site you must activate it.
ACTIVE.RESET_CONFIRM_MSG: The active theme will be cleared and the app will return to the default theme. Continue?

GUIDE.TITLE: How to use
GUIDE.SUBTITLE: Quick guide to the recommended workflow for themes.

TOUR.TITLE: Themes tour
TOUR.SUBTITLE: Step {{step}} of {{total}}
TOUR.STEP1_BODY: The draft is where you edit tokens (CSS variables). After publishing, the system keeps a draft so you can continue iterating.
TOUR.STEP2_BODY: A preset is a reusable template of tokens + metadata. You can apply it to the draft to get started faster.
TOUR.STEP3_BODY: Preview generates a temporary link to view the theme without activating it. Great for validating before publishing.
TOUR.STEP4_BODY: Publish creates a stable version. Activate applies it to the public site. Deactivate returns to the default theme.

HELP.TITLE: What is this?
HELP.PRESET_BODY: Reusable template of tokens + metadata to apply quickly to the draft.
HELP.TOKENS_BODY: JSON of CSS variables. Only keys starting with “--” are applied (e.g. --cui-primary).
HELP.METADATA_BODY: Free-form JSON to store info (displayName, mode, notes...). It does not affect styling unless the app uses it.

NEXT.TITLE: Recommended next step
NEXT.CREATE_DRAFT: Create or open the draft to start defining the theme.
NEXT.PUBLISH: You have a pending draft. Publish to generate a stable version.
NEXT.ACTIVATE: It is published. Activate it to apply it to the public site.
NEXT.DEACTIVATE: This theme is active. You can deactivate it to return to the default theme.
